summary: Large stage decompilation PR for Mushroom Kingdom / Inishie stages, mainly replacing many grinishie1 and grinishie2 placeholder declarations with C implementations, callback tables, per-stage Ground gv structs, and supporting item/game-mode prototypes. It also renamed gm_8016AF88 to GetMatchTimer consistently in symbols, gm_1601.h, and gm_16AE.c after review feedback to avoid decomp.dev treating the function as regressed.
what_changed: Implemented substantial portions of src/melee/gr/grinishie1.c, including stage startup, object creation through StageCallbacks, block/question-block behavior, item spawning support, moving platform or block state updates, timer-based music switching, and helper inlines/macros.

Implemented substantial portions of src/melee/gr/grinishie2.c, including startup, callback table grI2_803E4AB4, stage object setup, collision toggling through mpLib_80057BC0, animation setup, Birdo/Cathrine-related item integration, and a copied/parallel less-than-20-seconds music change path.

Added grInishie1_Block and several grInishie1/grInishie2 Ground variable structs to src/melee/gr/types.h, then added them to the Ground union as inishie1, inishie12, inishie13, inishie2, inishie22, and inishie23.
Updated grinishie1.h and grinishie2.h to expose many more concrete function prototypes and corrected callback signatures to take HSD_GObj/Ground_GObj where needed.
Renamed gm_8016AF88 to GetMatchTimer in config/GALE01/symbols.txt, src/melee/gm/gm_1601.h, and src/melee/gm/gm_16AE.c.
Added It_Common_Start and It_Common_End defines in src/melee/it/forward.h for iterating common item kinds.
Refined itkyasarin.h prototypes from UNK_PARAMS to typed signatures involving Item_GObj, Vec3, HSD_GObj, Point3d, and f32.
Added or used grmaterial declarations needed by the new stage code.
smart_moves: The PR kept the game-mode timer rename synchronized across the symbol map, public header, and implementation; review explicitly noted this prevents the decomp.dev bot from interpreting the symbol-only rename as a regression.
Instead of duplicating an extern for GetMatchTimer in grinishie1.c, the final code includes gm/gm_1601.h, matching review guidance and keeping ownership of the declaration in the game-mode header.
Stage behavior was organized around StageCallbacks arrays for grinishie1 and grinishie2, matching the project pattern for ground object init/update/render callbacks.
The grInishie1_Block struct and Ground gv structs captured recurring per-object state, making later stage work easier to reason about even though some fields remain provisional.
The code preserved important retail-like diagnostics and asserts such as OSReport messages, invalid_state behavior, and assert strings, which can help matching and future field naming.
Common item iteration was expressed with It_Common_Start and It_Common_End instead of hard-coded enum endpoints, improving reuse for item-spawn logic.
decomp_lessons: When renaming a symbol from an address-style name to a semantic name, update symbols.txt, the defining C file, and the declaring header together; partial renames can confuse matching/regression tooling.
Prefer including the owning header for cross-system declarations instead of local extern declarations in a stage file.
For stage files, callback signatures should be made concrete early because many no-op placeholders still need HSD_GObj-compatible prototypes to fit StageCallbacks.
Ground union additions are often required before stage functions can be expressed naturally; add per-stage gv structs in types.h rather than scattering casts or opaque offsets through the C file.

Comments like "probably", "likely", and TODOs in this PR show that provisional field names are acceptable when evidence is incomplete, but uncertainty should be encoded in names/comments rather than overclaiming.
Stage pairs with related behavior can share matching insights: grInishie2_801FCF2C was noted as copy-pasted from grInishie1_801FCB10 for the less-than-20-seconds music switch.
Inline helper extraction can make random range generation, fabs/clamp behavior, and repeated object flag loops easier to match without creating unrelated global symbols.
naming_conventions: Stage globals follow file-specific prefixes such as grI1_804D69F8, grI1_803B8268, grI1_803E48F4, grI2_804D6A00, and grI2_803E4AB4.
New stage struct names use grInishie1_ and grInishie2_ prefixes, for example grInishie1_Block, grInishie1_GroundVars, grInishie2_GroundVars2, and grInishie2_GroundVars3.
Unidentified fields retained offset-like names such as xC4, xC6, xD8, x108, unk0, unk14, and unk2C, sometimes with explanatory comments instead of premature semantic names.
Inishie1 question-block object state used the observed assert-derived name hatena_gobj.
Item enum range helpers were named It_Common_Start and It_Common_End.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used static inline helpers test_random, randi_between, fabsf_inline, and fclamp0 to reproduce small code patterns locally.
Used a DOBJ_LOOP macro around HSD_JObjGetDObj/HSD_DObjSetFlags traversal to express repeated display-object flag behavior.
Used bitfield structs/unions for Ground gv flags such as xC4_flags_b0 and grInishie2 xC4_flags.b0.
Preserved control-flow details such as switch fallthrough in grInishie1 block status handling.
Kept assert/OSReport strings and line-number-like constants in stage code, which are useful anchors for matching.
Represented stage object setup through Ground_801C14D0, GObj_SetupGXLink, callback assignment, and HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54 rather than ad hoc setup.
Used BLOCK_COUNT 19 and a block_idx_table reflecting the documented 3-13-3 block pattern on the stage.

review_feedback.author: r-burns
review_feedback.feedback: should include this declaration from melee/gm/gm_1601.h instead of duplicating it here
review_feedback.lesson: Do not add local extern declarations for functions that already have a project header.

review_feedback.author: r-burns
review_feedback.feedback: should rename the corresponding function in gm_16AE, otherwise the decomp.dev bot thinks this function has regressed
review_feedback.lesson: Symbol renames need matching source/header renames to keep tooling state consistent.

review_feedback.author: r-burns
review_feedback.lesson: No additional technical feedback was present in the provided issue-comment excerpt.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename or further document grInishie1_GroundVars and grInishie2_GroundVars fields.
Search for subsequent cleanup of grInishie1_801FC4A0, grInishie1_801FCAAC, fn_801FBF6C, and other placeholders still present after this PR.
Check whether the inline helpers test_random, randi_between, fabsf_inline, and fclamp0 were later moved to shared headers as the author suspected.
Search for later PRs that clarify Ground_801C5A94 as a stage identifier or music selector.
Look for future item header work around itkyasarin.h and Birdo/Cathrine item spawning signatures.
